title: Combat Dummy
description: A Combat Dummy that tracks damage and can also fight players.
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c53c7d60ee44ecf8f19597ac2dc8695275c57c0c_0.webp)

## 📖 Description A combat dummy that shows the current DPS the player does, the damage each hit does, and how many hits you have dealt. The combat dummy will have a toggleable option that enables the dummy to fight the player using custom-made AI in the next big patch. ## ⭐ Features • DPS counter above the combat dummy.
• Damage icons per hit showing how much damage was dealt.
• Highest damage per second counter.
• Support for multiple combat dummies.
• ~~Custom AI to fight the player.~~ coming soon.
Should work for multiplayer, but might still have some bugs.
## How to place a Combat Dummy Use the command `/trigger Dummy` to summon one at your location. ## Preview
